title: RBI (Trade Receivables Discounting System) Master Directions, 2026
description: <cite index="54-16,54-17">RBI issued final TReDS Master Directions 2026 on June 23, 2026. MSME seller due diligence removed, ₹25 crore net worth mandated for operators, credit guarantee from GoI trusts permitted, and re-discounting enabled.</cite>
